title: Benjamin Diokno's Philippine Economic Vision
description: Benjamin Diokno, Governor of the Bangko Sentral ng Pilipinas (BSP), presented his vision for the Philippines' economic growth. He emphasized the importance of foreign direct investments (FDIs) and the BSP's role in enabling their growth. Diokno also discussed sustaining the country's economic momentum and becoming an 'economic champion' in the post-COVID world.
